short_descriptions.zh-CN: 由 PM、技术负责人、QA 和设计共同完成规划、实现、评审与验证。
short_descriptions.en: Plan, build, review, and verify software work with PM, Technical Lead, QA, and Design.

descriptions.zh-CN: 负责范围、优先级、验收标准、任务路由、最终评审和项目决策人沟通。
descriptions.en: Owns scope, priority, acceptance criteria, task routing, final review, and stakeholder alignment.

descriptions.zh-CN: 负责技术方案、任务拆解、实现、代码质量和技术风险。
descriptions.en: Owns technical design, task breakdown, implementation, code quality, and technical risk.

descriptions.zh-CN: 负责行为验证、回归检查、测试证据和缺陷反馈。
descriptions.en: Owns behavior verification, regression checks, test evidence, and defect feedback.

descriptions.zh-CN: 负责产品交互、视觉设计、用户体验和用户文案。
descriptions.en: Owns product interaction, visual design, user experience, and user-facing copy.

descriptions.zh-CN: 澄清问题、范围、目标和验收标准。
descriptions.en: Clarifies the problem, scope, goals, and acceptance criteria.

descriptions.zh-CN: 比较选项、记录取舍并形成明确结论。
descriptions.en: Compares options, records tradeoffs, and produces a clear decision.

descriptions.zh-CN: 产出用户体验、界面、视觉、交互或用户文案。
descriptions.en: Produces user experience, interface, visual, interaction, or user-copy work.

descriptions.zh-CN: 完成实现、重构或技术改造。
descriptions.en: Implements, refactors, or performs technical changes.

descriptions.zh-CN: 完成缺陷复现、定位、修复和回归准备。
descriptions.en: Reproduces, diagnoses, fixes, and prepares defects for regression testing.

descriptions.zh-CN: 执行测试、验证、回归和发布检查。
descriptions.en: Performs testing, validation, regression, and release checks.

descriptions.zh-CN: 处理配置、构建、文档和工程维护。
descriptions.en: Handles configuration, build work, documentation, and engineering maintenance.
